content:
🔥 gosuki | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a unified, private, and synchronized bookmark management solution across various browsers and devices without relying on cloud services or browser extensions.
✨ Key Features: • Extension-free bookmark management • Multi-browser and multi-profile support • Real-time synchronization (local or P2P) • Portable database • Cloudless and privacy-first design
📖 Summary: GoSuki is a privacy-focused, extension-free bookmark manager written in Go. It unifies bookmarks across multiple browsers and profiles, offering real-time local or P2P synchronization with a portable database and optional archiving capabilities.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
